title: Im calling it right now
wikitext:
[]: "I'm calling it right now" (Spoilers) Post by Monk Ed » Fri Jun 25, 2010 8:22 pm I saw some "calling" in another thread and thought it would be neat to collect a record all in one place. Put here whatever you want to futurely gloat about coming true in Rebuild. The topic is marked spoilers because "callings" obviously rely on the latest available information. For example: I'm calling it right now: Mari is as human as the other Children.

[]: Re: "I'm calling it right now" (Spoilers) Post by Legendary » Fri Jun 25, 2010 9:12 pm Monk Ed wrote: I'm calling it right now: Mari is as human as the other Children.

[]: Re: "I'm calling it right now" (Spoilers) Post by Monk Ed » Fri Jun 25, 2010 9:48 pm Legendary wrote: Considering that Kaworu can breathe on the moon, does this mean none of them are human?

[]: Post by child of Lilith » Fri Jun 25, 2010 9:53 pm This thread just started, and somebody already got owned? Damn... that was fast.

[]: Post by chee » Fri Jun 25, 2010 9:55 pm I'm calling it right now that when 3.0 comes out, there will be 10x as many shitstorms than 2.0 caused.

[]: Post by SJCrew » Fri Jun 25, 2010 10:10 pm chee wrote: I'm calling it right now that when 3.0 comes out, there will be 10x as many shitstorms than 2.0 caused.

[]: Post by Seele00TextOnly » Fri Jun 25, 2010 10:16 pm For fun, I'll give srs responses because I love zany speculation. I'm pretty sure I was first with these, mostly from my ramblings in the IRC chans. - Arael attacks the sequestered Nerv personnel with a wide beam, providing for a mindfuckery exposition scene featuring the other adults finally. - Misato dies before Kaji - Key of Nebuchadnezzar is implanted under Asuka's eyepatch - Asuka-centered Instrumentality

[]: Post by Sailor Star Dust » Fri Jun 25, 2010 10:39 pm Off the top of my head thoughts: (No I don't take credit for all of these. I try to give credit when I remember who came up with what.) -At least one of Kuma's theories regarding Rei and the Evangelions (or Naw's theory with a tiny Rei being inside the Dummy System) is going to be right. -My own theory: the shot of Q-preview Mari is her talking with the Rei(s). The Reis are either NME's take of the Reiquarium and or the Dummy System. -Ritsuko and or Yui will explain the weirdness (pilots being able to berserk complete with glowing eyes and all, how much control Shinji had versus Yui, why the hell could Mari pilot Eva-02, etc.) of the Zeruel battle. -IF an Asuka/Shinji kiss happens, then Shinji will be the one to kiss Asuka. -Likewise, Asuka will be the one to strangle Shinji (Bardiel doesn't count) if things get right down to it. -I agree with Monk that Mari will wind up being normal just like Asuka, Shinji and the classmates are. Which brings me to my next two points... -That thing in Central Dogma? Yeah, it's still Lilith. Rei still has Lilith's soul with Yui's DNA ala NGE. -Mark-06 is actually Adam(s). Similarly, Kaworu still has Adam's soul. -Eva-08 is an "upgraded" version of Eva-01. -We'll see Kaji's killer on-screen if he actually kicks the bucket this time. Also, his killer will be the same guy who killed him from that Secret of Evangelion game (the protagonist of the game), just for shits and giggles. -The red oceans will return to being blue (and full of life) after Third Impact occurs. -Shinji will actually get an honest-to-god happy ending this time around instead of the Instrumentality Over ending of EoTV or the bittersweetness of EoE. The other cast? Who knows. Rei actually living would be nice but I'm not going to hold my breath. That's all from me for now.

[]: Post by Monk Ed » Fri Jun 25, 2010 11:02 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: -The red oceans will return to being blue (and full of life) after Third Impact occurs. -Shinji will actually get an honest-to-god happy ending this time around instead of the Instrumentality Over ending of EoTV or the bittersweetness of EoE.

[]: Post by Clover » Fri Jun 25, 2010 11:58 pm -Rei in the yellow sweater in the Q preview? Yeah, that's AU Rei from EoTV. -Asuka with an eye-patch? Synchronicity between the dimensions. Bet her arm is wrecked too. -The ADAMS? God Council created by the Rebuild FAR to oversee planetary "terraforming."

[]: Post by AuraTwilight » Sat Jun 26, 2010 1:36 am I'm calling it now. It's going to turn out Sequel Theory is true, but Rebuild is actually a prequel to the original Evangelion. HAHA SUCK IT

[]: Post by SaltyJoe » Sat Jun 26, 2010 1:36 am -There will be not one, but two Eva-07's, an A and a B version. They will be created on the spot from the remains of Eva-02 and Eva-03 (it's vertebrae and lower body were still mostly in one piece) using those mysterious groundbreaking technologies that were sought to be implemented in Eva-04. -Kaji will die in Misato's arms. -Kaworu will destroy Rei's physical form, to "free" Lilith's soul for Instrumentality. Shinji shall angst. -Prediction for ending: the only survivors will be Asuka and one of those chibi Reis. Asuka will set out to become a space faring outlaw, but will come back to Earth regularly to visit chibi-Rei. On her seventh birthday, she will give her an ocarina and... okay, i made the reference i wanted to make. Those who can get it will get it.

[]: Post by UrsusArctos » Sat Jun 26, 2010 2:35 am SaltyJoe wrote: -There will be not one, but two Eva-07's, an A and a B version. They will be created on the spot from the remains of Eva-02 and Eva-03 (it's vertebrae and lower body were still mostly in one piece) using those mysterious groundbreaking technologies that were sought to be implemented in Eva-04.

[]: Post by SaltyJoe » Sat Jun 26, 2010 9:55 am UrsusArctos wrote: Holy Mola, you might be on to something. Your Eva-07 seems to be taking after old Israfel, the 7th Angel. A twin Eva attacking in synch would be awesome to behold.

[]: Post by Twin Drive Sigma Aquarion » Sat Jun 26, 2010 11:00 am I'm calling that Unit 08 is based on an Assault Type Aquarion, Shoji Kawamori is influencing Rebuild from the shadows, at least one new angel is coming, one angel is either going to be Arael or have his powers (anyone that whines over gender gets Getter Tomahawked), Bardiel had something to do with Asuka's eyepatch, and that Zeruel is somewhat still alive by becoming part of Rei.

[]: Post by Shogo-Kun » Sat Jun 26, 2010 11:19 am SaltyJoe wrote: -There will be not one, but two Eva-07's, an A and a B version.

[]: Post by Eva 02 » Sat Jun 26, 2010 1:10 pm Shinji and Rei will bang. You can tell they want to make Rei appear more human and develope feelings between the children more

[]: Post by AuraTwilight » Sat Jun 26, 2010 2:04 pm Also, a fat EVA Character and a black EVA Character! The fat one is Japanese American and the black one is African Japanese. The idea: What if two characters from an American cartoon wandered into EVA?

[]: Post by Marduk » Sat Jun 26, 2010 4:04 pm Eva 02 wrote: Shinji and Rei will bang. You can tell they want to make Rei appear more human and develope feelings between the children more

[]: Post by berto » Sat Jun 26, 2010 4:11 pm Personal theory, I think Touji is still one of the chosen pilots an d I'll go as far as to say him and Kaouru are still perspectively the fourth and fifth child. Also, in the preview they showed the four shadows in Gendo's offce, everyone seems to assum that it was the four luminecent beens that were in Secornd Impact, but I think that the shadows belong to the four remaining pilots.
